name: agent-pipeline-codex
description: Multi-stage agentic pipeline runner for Codex Desktop App projects. Orchestrates manifest -> research -> plan -> test-write -> execute -> policy -> verify -> drift-detect -> critique -> auto-promote -> manager. v0.8 adds a separate intake skill that drafts starting artifacts from a plain-English product, repo, design, task, bug, or feature description without starting work.

interface.shortDescription: Manifest-driven multi-stage agent workflow for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Agent Pipeline for Codex brings the agentic-pipeline discipline to Codex Desktop App: intake drafting, explicit manifests, human gates, role-scoped subagents, policy checks, drift detection, critique, auto-promote, module-release rehearsal, and dual-AI audit handoff scaffolding.
defaultPrompt: Draft a pipeline run from my task.
